languages.text: "Как генетор, я выступлю наблюдателем в процессе. Если дело касается чего-то столь богопротивного, как генетическое искажение образа человека, нужны обширные знания в весьма... специфических областях дисциплин медике". {n}Эоганн с сомнением смотрит на Кляйна.{/n} "Вмешиваться в процедуру я не стану, дабы не препятствовать труду подчиненных мастера Иокасты, но результат ее интерпретирую во всей полноте".

"As a Genetor, I will act as an observer. When it pertains to something as unholy as the genetic distortion of the image of Humanity, one must be armed with extensive knowledge of highly... specific areas of the medicae disciplines." {n}Eogunn casts a dubious look at Klein.{/n} "I will not interfere in the procedure, so as not to hinder the work of Mistress Sauerback's subordinates, but I will interpret the result in its entirety."
languages.original_text: "Как генетор, я выступлю наблюдателем в процессе. Если дело касается чего-то столь богопротивного, как генетическое искажение образа человека, нужны обширные знания в весьма... специфических областях дисциплин медике". {n}Эоганн с сомнением смотрит на Кляйна.{/n} "Вмешиваться в процедуру я не стану, дабы не препятствовать труду подчиненных мастера Иокасты, но результат ее интерпретирую во всей полноте".

When it pertains to something as unholy as the genetic distortion of the image of Humanity, one must be armed with extensive knowledge of highly... specific areas of the medicae disciplines." {n}Eogunn casts a dubious look at Klein.{/n} "I will not interfere in the procedure, so as not to hinder the work of Mistress Sauerback's subordinates, but I will interpret the result in its entirety."

"As a Genetor, I will act as an observer. When it pertains to something as unholy as the genetic distortion of the image of Humanity, one must be armed with extensive knowledge of highly... specific areas of the medicae disciplines." {n}Eogunn casts a dubious look at Klein.{/n} "I will not interfere in the procedure, so as not to hinder the work of Mistress Sauerback's subordinates, but I will interpret the result in its entirety."

languages.text: «Como genetor, ejerceré de observador. Cuando tratamos con algo tan sacrílego como la distorsión genética de la imagen de la Humanidad, hay que estar armado con un conocimiento extenso de campos extremadamente... específicos de las disciplinas medicae». {n}Eogunn mira dubitativo a Klein.{/n} «No interferiré en el proceso, no sea que entorpezca la labor de los subordinados de la maestra Sauerback, pero interpretaré la totalidad del resultado».
languages.original_text: "As a Genetor, I will act as an observer. When it pertains to something as unholy as the genetic distortion of the image of Humanity, one must be armed with extensive knowledge of highly... specific areas of the medicae disciplines." {n}Eogunn casts a dubious look at Klein.{/n} "I will not interfere in the procedure, so as not to hinder the work of Mistress Sauerback's subordinates, but I will interpret the result in its entirety."

traits.locale_text: «Como genetor, ejerceré de observador. Cuando tratamos con algo tan sacrílego como la distorsión genética de la imagen de la Humanidad, hay que estar armado con un conocimiento extenso de campos extremadamente... específicos de las disciplinas medicae». {n}Eogunn mira dubitativo a Klein.{/n} «No interferiré en el proceso, no sea que entorpezca la labor de los subordinados de la maestra Sauerback, pero interpretaré la totalidad del resultado».

languages.text: “作为一名基因士，我会作为观察者参与。面对人类形象的基因扭曲这等亵渎之事，必须掌握特定医学领域中某些极其……专业的知识。”{n}伊奥贡满腹怀疑地瞥了一眼克莱因。{/n}“我不会插手手术过程，以免妨碍苏尔贝克女士部下的工作，但我会对结果作出完整分析。”
languages.original_text: "As a Genetor, I will act as an observer. When it pertains to something as unholy as the genetic distortion of the image of Humanity, one must be armed with extensive knowledge of highly... specific areas of the medicae disciplines." {n}Eogunn casts a dubious look at Klein.{/n} "I will not interfere in the procedure, so as not to hinder the work of Mistress Sauerback's subordinates, but I will interpret the result in its entirety."

traits.locale_text: “作为一名基因士，我会作为观察者参与。面对人类形象的基因扭曲这等亵渎之事，必须掌握特定医学领域中某些极其……专业的知识。”{n}伊奥贡满腹怀疑地瞥了一眼克莱因。{/n}“我不会插手手术过程，以免妨碍苏尔贝克女士部下的工作，但我会对结果作出完整分析。”

languages.text: « En tant que genetor, je resterai en observation. Dans les cas impies comme la distorsion génétique de l'image de l'humanité, une connaissance complète de certains domaines hautement... spécifiques des disciplines de medicae est nécessaire. » {n}Eogunn lance un regard sceptique à Klein.{/n} « Je n'interviendrai pas dans la procédure afin de ne pas perturber le travail des subordonnés de maîtresse Sauerback, mais j'analyserai l'ensemble des résultats. »
languages.original_text: "As a Genetor, I will act as an observer. When it pertains to something as unholy as the genetic distortion of the image of Humanity, one must be armed with extensive knowledge of highly... specific areas of the medicae disciplines." {n}Eogunn casts a dubious look at Klein.{/n} "I will not interfere in the procedure, so as not to hinder the work of Mistress Sauerback's subordinates, but I will interpret the result in its entirety."

traits.locale_text: « En tant que genetor, je resterai en observation. Dans les cas impies comme la distorsion génétique de l'image de l'humanité, une connaissance complète de certains domaines hautement... spécifiques des disciplines de medicae est nécessaire. » {n}Eogunn lance un regard sceptique à Klein.{/n} « Je n'interviendrai pas dans la procédure afin de ne pas perturber le travail des subordonnés de maîtresse Sauerback, mais j'analyserai l'ensemble des résultats. »

languages.text: "Bir Genetör olarak sadece gözlemci olacağım. İnsanlık imajının genetik olarak bozulması kadar şeytani bir konu söz konusu olunca, tıbbi disiplinlerin son derece... Spesifik alanlarında kapsamlı bilgi sahibi olmak gerekir." {n}Eogunn, Klein'a şüpheyle bakıyor.{/n} "Sauerback Hanım'ın astlarının işini engellememek için prosedüre müdahale etmeyeceğim ancak sonucu bütünüyle yorumlayacağım."
languages.original_text: "As a Genetor, I will act as an observer. When it pertains to something as unholy as the genetic distortion of the image of Humanity, one must be armed with extensive knowledge of highly... specific areas of the medicae disciplines." {n}Eogunn casts a dubious look at Klein.{/n} "I will not interfere in the procedure, so as not to hinder the work of Mistress Sauerback's subordinates, but I will interpret the result in its entirety."

traits.locale_text: "Bir Genetör olarak sadece gözlemci olacağım. İnsanlık imajının genetik olarak bozulması kadar şeytani bir konu söz konusu olunca, tıbbi disiplinlerin son derece... Spesifik alanlarında kapsamlı bilgi sahibi olmak gerekir." {n}Eogunn, Klein'a şüpheyle bakıyor.{/n} "Sauerback Hanım'ın astlarının işini engellememek için prosedüre müdahale etmeyeceğim ancak sonucu bütünüyle yorumlayacağım."

languages.text: 「ゲネターとして、私は観察者を務めます。人類の似姿の遺伝的歪曲ほど不浄なものに関わる際には、メディカエ諸学のきわめて……特殊な領域に関する広範な知識で武装していなければなりません」{n}エオガンはクラインに疑わしげな視線を投げた。{/n}「ザウアーバック女史の部下たちの作業を妨げぬよう、私は手技には干渉しませんが、その結果は余すところなく解釈いたします」
languages.original_text: "As a Genetor, I will act as an observer. When it pertains to something as unholy as the genetic distortion of the image of Humanity, one must be armed with extensive knowledge of highly... specific areas of the medicae disciplines." {n}Eogunn casts a dubious look at Klein.{/n} "I will not interfere in the procedure, so as not to hinder the work of Mistress Sauerback's subordinates, but I will interpret the result in its entirety."

traits.locale_text: 「ゲネターとして、私は観察者を務めます。人類の似姿の遺伝的歪曲ほど不浄なものに関わる際には、メディカエ諸学のきわめて……特殊な領域に関する広範な知識で武装していなければなりません」{n}エオガンはクラインに疑わしげな視線を投げた。{/n}「ザウアーバック女史の部下たちの作業を妨げぬよう、私は手技には干渉しませんが、その結果は余すところなく解釈いたします」

languages.text: "Als Genetor werde ich als Beobachter agieren. Wenn es um etwas wie die genetische Störung des Abbildes der Menschheit geht, muss man über umfassende Kenntnisse der überaus ... spezifischen Bereiche der Medicae-Disziplinen verfügen." {n}Eogunn wirft Klein einen ominösen Blick zu.{/n} "Ich werde in das Prozedere nicht eingreifen, um die Arbeit der Untergebenen von Meisterin Sauerback nicht zu behindern, die Ergebnisse in ihrer Gesamtheit aber interpretieren."
languages.original_text: "As a Genetor, I will act as an observer. When it pertains to something as unholy as the genetic distortion of the image of Humanity, one must be armed with extensive knowledge of highly... specific areas of the medicae disciplines." {n}Eogunn casts a dubious look at Klein.{/n} "I will not interfere in the procedure, so as not to hinder the work of Mistress Sauerback's subordinates, but I will interpret the result in its entirety."
